name: astrojones-dev
description: The astrojones org plugin: nuklaut deploy knowledge, app scaffolding (born harnessed via repo-agent-harness), repo-carried deploy tools, CI failure diagnosis, plus the harness's Claude Code surface — coding-workflow skills, subagents, safety-hook shims, and /harness-init. The harness MCP server itself stays per-repo (sha-pinned .mcp.json); this plugin ships no server.
